raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current baseline","name":"What feels most important to get right in your brand design work right now, Carlos?","description":"Surfaces his current working definition of success before specifics land.","purpose":"topic","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recent example","name":"Can you walk me through one piece of recent work that you think met the bar?","description":"Forces a concrete example of quality rather than a general claim.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quality bar","name":"What made that piece feel up to standard to you?","description":"Gets at the criteria he is using to judge quality in practice.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback change","name":"What did you change in your process after the last round of feedback?","description":"Checks whether feedback translated into observable behavior changes.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation mismatch","name":"Where do your standards for good work differ from mine right now?","description":"Names a likely source of misalignment without softening the gap.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Blocked practice","name":"What part of your craft feels hardest to improve at the moment?","description":"Surfaces the specific growth block rather than a vague development wish.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What kind of practice or feedback would help you move that forward fastest?","description":"Identifies the most useful near-term development support.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Work environment","name":"What in your current workload makes quality harder to hold consistently?","description":"Looks for capacity or context issues that affect execution quality.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Focus choice","name":"Which one skill do you want to practice over the next few weeks?","description":"Forces a concrete development choice the manager can align around.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next step","name":"What is the first concrete change you want to make before we meet again?","description":"Ends on an actionable commitment tied to the discussion.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
